columns.name: subject
columns.description: Short summary line of the issue.

columns.name: body_preview
columns.description: First inbound message, truncated for list views.

columns.name: channel
columns.description: Where the ticket came in from.

columns.name: summary
columns.description: One-line agent summary of what the customer needs.

columns.name: tags
columns.description: Free-form labels from triage (array of strings).

columns.name: assignee_user_id
columns.description: Pod member who owns this ticket.

columns.name: related_ticket_id
columns.description: Likely-duplicate or related ticket, set by triage dedupe.

columns.name: sla_due_at
columns.description: When a first response is due, based on priority.

columns.name: first_response_at
columns.description: Timestamp of the first outbound reply.
